title: Verify Monthly Subscription Option
test_steps: Open the Dcoder app. | Navigate to the Subscription Options screen. | Click on the 'Monthly Subscription (Dcoder, Mobile Compiler IDE)' option. | Verify that the subscription details are displayed correctly. | Click on the 'PURCHASE' button. | Verify that the purchase process is initiated.
expected_result: Subscription details are displayed correctly. | The 'PURCHASE' button is clickable. | The purchase process is initiated successfully.
